ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country in which the city is located */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province in which the city is located */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country in which the province is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the province */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the province data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population statistic */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the statistic applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population is recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population recorded for that year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical feature */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of geographical feature (e.g., mountain, river) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the geographical feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_features_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the indicator applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicator is recorded */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the statistic applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistic is recorded */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of health statistic (e.g., hospital beds per capita, mortality rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the health statistic */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the health data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the health statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education metric */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the metric applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metric is recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of education metric (e.g., literacy rate, school enrollment rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the education metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the education data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the education metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_metrics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., government, private sector, research institute) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_economic_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic activity */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city in which the activity takes place */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of economic activity (e.g., manufacturing, services, agriculture) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic activity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the economic activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_economic_activities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
